---
name: Documentation Issue
about: Report a problem with documentation or suggest improvements
title: "[DOCS] "
labels: ["documentation"]
assignees: ""
---

## Documentation Issue Type

- [ ] Outdated information
- [ ] Missing documentation
- [ ] Unclear explanation
- [ ] Broken links
- [ ] Typo/Grammar error
- [ ] Code example issue
- [ ] API documentation problem
- [ ] Installation guide issue
- [ ] Other (please describe)

## Issue Description

A clear and concise description of the documentation issue.

## Location

Where is the issue located?

- **File**: [e.g. README.md, CONTRIBUTING.md, API docs]
- **Section**: [e.g. Installation, API Reference, Contributing]
- **URL**: [If applicable, provide the URL]

## Current Content

Please provide the current problematic content:

```
[Paste the current content here]
```

## Suggested Fix

Please provide the corrected or improved content:

```
[Paste the suggested fix here]
```

## Expected Improvement

How would this change improve the documentation?

## Target Audience

Who would benefit from this documentation improvement?

- [ ] New contributors
- [ ] Experienced developers
- [ ] End users
- [ ] System administrators
- [ ] Security researchers

## Related Documentation

- Related to #[issue number]
- References other docs: [document name]
- Should be linked from: [document name]

## Screenshots

If applicable, add screenshots to help explain the issue.

## Additional Context

Add any other context about the documentation issue here.

## Checklist

- [ ] I have searched the existing documentation issues
- [ ] I have provided a clear description of the issue
- [ ] I have specified the location of the issue
- [ ] I have suggested a fix or improvement
- [ ] I have considered the target audience
